name: Cryotherapy — Wart

cptCodes.display: Destruction of benign lesions other than skin tags or vascular proliferative lesions; up to 14 lesions

otherSuppliesUsed: Liquid nitrogen, cotton-tipped applicator or cryospray
otherPostInstructions: Expect blister; will resolve in 7–14 days; F/U in 2–3 weeks if persistent
